name: negative_random_alphanumeric_not_cci
description: Negative case: body text contains tokens that look CCI-shaped ('REF-000015', 'IDX-123456', 'ABC-000099') but don't match the literal 'CCI-' prefix that _CCI_RE requires. Tier 2 should produce zero hits. Pins the strict prefix anchor — a regression that loosens the regex to '[A-Z]{3}-\d{6}' would tag CCI-000015 here by accident. Filename is scan.ckl so the text-scrape branch actually fires (kind-gate added 2026-06-07); otherwise a regex-loosening mutation would be masked by the gate.

evidence.text: Reference REF-000015 and IDX-123456 and ABC-000099. None of these are CCIs.
